{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success

Edit applied successfully.

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}

  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}
```

  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  const requestedProvider = body.provider;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Build ordered list of providers to try\n  const providersToTry = requestedProvider\n    ? getOrderedProviders(requestedProvider)\n    : getOrderedProviders();\n\n  // Filter to only available providers\n  const availableProviders = providersToTry.filter(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n  if (availableProviders.length === 0) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers available' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!requestedProvider) {\n    log(`[auto-select] Trying providers in order: ${availableProviders.join(' → ')}`);\n  }\n\n  let lastError: { status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> } | null = null;\n\n  for (const provider of availableProviders) {\n    const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n    if (!config) continue;\n\n    // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n    const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n    const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n    const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n    try {\n      let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n      const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n      // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n      if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n        const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n      } else {\n        const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n        cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n      }\n\n      if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n        // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n        const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n        const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n        recordProviderFailure(provider);\n        log(`[fallback] ${provider} failed (exit ${cliResult.exitCode}, type=${type}), ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n        lastError = {\n          status: httpStatus,\n          body: { error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`, type, provider, exitCode: cliResult.exitCode },\n        };\n        // If explicitly requested, or retryable error on last provider → try next\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n      const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n      const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n      recordProviderSuccess(provider);\n\n      const response: CompletionResponse = {\n        content,\n        provider,\n        model: resolvedModel,\n        tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n        latencyMs,\n      };\n\n      res.json(response);\n      return;\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\n      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n      recordProviderFailure(provider);\n      log(`[fallback] ${provider} threw: ${message}, ${availableProviders.indexOf(provider) < availableProviders.length - 1 ? 'trying next provider...' : 'no more providers'}`);\n\n      if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n        lastError = { status: 504, body: { error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider } };\n      } else {\n        lastError = { status: 500, body: { error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider } };\n      }\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // All providers failed — return the last error\n  if (lastError) {\n    res.status(lastError.status).json(lastError.body);\n  } else {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: 'No providers could handle the request' });\n  }\n});",
  "oldString": "// Completion endpoint\napp.post('/api/complete', async (req, res) => {\n  const body = req.body as CompletionRequest;\n  const { messages, model, maxTokens = 4096, temperature, tier } = body;\n  let { provider } = body;\n\n  // Validate request\n  if (!messages?.length) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing required field: messages' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Auto-select provider if not specified: pick first available\n  if (!provider) {\n    const available = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).find(p => providerStatuses[p]?.available);\n    if (!available) {\n      res.status(503).json({ error: 'No provider specified and no providers available' });\n      return;\n    }\n    provider = available as CompletionRequest['provider'];\n    log(`[auto-select] No provider specified, using: ${provider}`);\n  }\n\n  const config = CLI_CONFIGS[provider];\n  if (!config) {\n    res.status(400).json({ error: `Unknown provider: ${provider}. Supported: ${Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS).join(', ')}` });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const status = providerStatuses[provider];\n  if (!status?.available) {\n    res.status(503).json({ error: `Provider ${provider} not available`, type: 'PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE' });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Resolve model from tier or use explicit model\n  const resolvedModel = model || (tier ? config.tierModels[tier] : undefined) || config.defaultModel;\n  const prompt = formatPrompt(messages);\n  const requestStartTime = Date.now();\n\n  try {\n    let cliResult: { stdout: string; stderr: string; exitCode: number };\n    const timeoutMs = body.timeout || DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS;\n\n    // Choose between arg-based or stdin-based invocation\n    if (config.useStdinForPrompt(prompt)) {\n      const args = config.buildArgsWithStdin(resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, prompt, timeoutMs);\n    } else {\n      const args = config.buildArgs(prompt, resolvedModel, maxTokens, temperature);\n      cliResult = await spawnCLIWithTimeout(config.command, args, undefined, timeoutMs);\n    }\n\n    if (cliResult.exitCode !== 0) {\n      // Some CLIs write errors to stdout (e.g. claude CLI), so check both\n      const errorOutput = cliResult.stderr.trim() || cliResult.stdout.trim();\n      const { status: httpStatus, type } = mapErrorToStatus(errorOutput);\n      res.status(httpStatus).json({\n        error: errorOutput || `CLI exited with code ${cliResult.exitCode}`,\n        type,\n        provider,\n        exitCode: cliResult.exitCode,\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const content = cliResult.stdout.trim();\n    const latencyMs = Date.now() - requestStartTime;\n    const inputTokens = estimateTokens(prompt);\n    const outputTokens = estimateTokens(content);\n\n    const response: CompletionResponse = {\n      content,\n      provider,\n      model: resolvedModel,\n      tokens: { input: inputTokens, output: outputTokens, total: inputTokens + outputTokens },\n      latencyMs,\n    };\n\n    res.json(response);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n    if (message.includes('timed out')) {\n      res.status(504).json({ error: message, type: 'TIMEOUT', provider });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    res.status(500).json({ error: message, type: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', provider });\n  }\n});"
}
```

{
  "filePath": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/llm-cli-proxy/src/server.ts",
  "newString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();\n\n// Provider health tracking: cooldown period after consecutive failures\nconst FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS = 60_000; // 1 min cooldown after failures\nconst MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN = 3; // After 3 consecutive failures, enter cooldown\n\nfunction recordProviderSuccess(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.consecutiveFailures = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction recordProviderFailure(providerName: string): void {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (status) {\n    status.recentFailures++;\n    status.consecutiveFailures++;\n    status.lastFailureTime = Date.now();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isProviderHealthy(providerName: string): boolean {\n  const status = providerStatuses[providerName];\n  if (!status?.available) return false;\n  // If too many consecutive failures, require cooldown before retrying\n  if (status.consecutiveFailures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_BEFORE_COOLDOWN) {\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - status.lastFailureTime;\n    if (elapsed < FAILURE_COOLDOWN_MS) {\n      return false; // Still in cooldown\n    }\n    // Cooldown expired, give it another chance\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction selectBestProvider(): string | null {\n  // First pass: find a healthy provider\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (isProviderHealthy(p)) return p;\n  }\n  // Second pass: any available provider (cooldown expired or not)\n  for (const p of Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS)) {\n    if (providerStatuses[p]?.available) return p;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nfunction getOrderedProviders(preferredProvider?: string): string[] {\n  const all = Object.keys(CLI_CONFIGS);\n  if (!preferredProvider) {\n    // Sort: healthy first, then by fewer consecutive failures\n    return all.sort((a, b) => {\n      const aHealthy = isProviderHealthy(a) ? 0 : 1;\n      const bHealthy = isProviderHealthy(b) ? 0 : 1;\n      if (aHealthy !== bHealthy) return aHealthy - bHealthy;\n      return (providerStatuses[a]?.consecutiveFailures || 0) - (providerStatuses[b]?.consecutiveFailures || 0);\n    });\n  }\n  // Put preferred first, then others\n  return [preferredProvider, ...all.filter(p => p !== preferredProvider)];\n}",
  "oldString": "// --- State ---\n\nconst providerStatuses: Record<string, ProviderStatus> = {};\nconst inFlightProcesses = new Set<ChildProcess>();\nlet startTime = Date.now();"
}
